channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-21
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. Notably, the `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects, both focused on statistical analysis, have undergone updates, with `statcheck` integrating changes on its `feature-non-apa-newer` branch and `escicheck` syncing with the `escicheckapp` repository to match version `0.6.13` of `effectcheck`. Meanwhile, the `oddpub` project has refined its ontogenerator, updating to version 7.3.0 and enhancing its documentation. The `docpluck`, `coarse`, and `regcheck` projects have also seen fixes and improvements, including updates to the model picker in `coarse` and bug fixes in `regcheck`. These connections and advancements highlight the collaborative spirit and dedication to precision within our community, as projects continually build upon and support each other's progress.

28 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub9 commits
tenzing7 commits
metacheck6 commits
regcheck6 commits
